content:
# Session 30 (iter-030) — review summary

## Metadata
- File worked: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (only prover lane).
- File sorry count: **1 → 2** (added brick 1′ succ `sorry`; `tensorPowAdd_comm` succ `sorry` unchanged).
  Increase is a NEW scaffolded lemma, not a regression — 2 axiom-clean decls also landed.
- Cold `lake build` GREEN (2626 jobs). Goal seed + B1–B7 assoc + GSemiring + PRIMARY all intact.
- Targets: `tensorBraiding_symm`, `braiding_canonical_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`,
  `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided` (brick 1′), `tensorPowAdd_comm` succ.

## Solved (2, both axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`)
- **`tensorBraiding_symm`** (β_{A,B}≪≫β_{B,A}=𝟙 for the hand-built braiding). Descend
  `SymmetricCategory.symmetry` through `MonoidalPresheaf X` (the symmetric instance is NOT registered on
  `X.Modules`, only `braidedCategory` is) via term-mode `sheafification.map_comp/map_id`. `rw [←
  sheafification.map_comp]` fails on the comp-instance diamond — use the term-mode `.trans` chain.
- **`braiding_canonical_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`** (canonical `(β_ L L).hom = 𝟙`). Read off PRIMARY
  `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` through `tensorBraiding_eq`, cancel the `tensorObjIso` bridge
  via `cancel_mono`. The canonical β-collapse input for the succ descents.

## Partial (1) — brick 1′ `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided`
Order-REVERSING first-index recursion `μ_{c+1,m} = α ≪≫ WL_{Lᶜ}(β_{L,Lᵐ}) ≪≫ α⁻¹ ≪≫ WR(μ_{c,m}) L ≪≫
reindex`, `[IsInvertible L]`. Induction on `m`.
- **Base `m=0` CLOSED.** Replace `β_{L,𝟙}` by unitors (`tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_braiding_unit`), canonical
  descent, finish by `rightUnitor_naturality` + `monoidal`. KEY: `tensorPow_zero` must be in the simp set so
  `L^0`/`unitModule X` unify and the bridges telescope.
- **Succ `m=k+1` PARTIAL (documented `sorry`).** ⚠ VERIFIED DEAD END: canonical-FIRST descent makes the
  braiding `β_ L (tensorObj (L^k) L)` whose 2nd factor is hand-built `tensorObj`, so
  `BraidedCategory.braiding_tensor_right_hom` does NOT fire. The β-split MUST be done at the HAND-BUILT
  level via brick 2 (`tensorBraiding_hexagon_forward`) BEFORE descent. Correct recipe left in code:
  (1) hand-built hexagon split, (2) reindex `rfl`, (3) IH fold + `β_{L,L}=𝟙` collapse via PRIMARY,
  (4) canonical descent of the structural residue + **generic-`M` core** (mirror
  `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core`, iter-025) to cancel the opaque `μ_{c,k}` (whiskered `▷L`) across the
  `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` comp-instance diamond, then `monoidal`. This is the genuine wall — the
  same one B6 crossed in iter-025.

## Blocked (1) — `tensorPowAdd_comm` succ (gated on brick 1′)
Residual `(*)` unchanged. Closure path verified by hand: substitute brick 1′, collapse the prefix
`α ≪≫ WL_{Lᶜ}(β_{Lᵐ,L} ≪≫ β_{L,Lᵐ}) ≪≫ α⁻¹` to `Iso.refl` via **`tensorBraiding_symm`** (delivered this
iter — exactly the ingredient this leg needed), cancel `WR(μ_{c,m})L`, reindexers by proof irrelevance,
`monoidal`. Once brick 1′ closes, `(*)` + `tensorPowAdd_comm` + `sectionsMul_mul_comm` + `gcommSemiring`
all close with NO further invertibility.

## Verification subagents (both highly-recommended, dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `sgr-iter030` — Lean FAITHFUL; 3 iter-030 decls match (2 axiom-clean, 1
  correctly sorried/unmarked). One must-fix: restore 33 over-stripped proof-`\leanok` (done — see below).
  2 minor coverage gaps (the 2 new private helpers have no blueprint block).
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-sgr-iter030.md`.
- **lean-auditor** `iter030` — SectionGradedRing.lean PASS: both new decls axiom-clean & sound; the 2
  sorries honest (LSP-confirmed non-trivial goals, `[IsInvertible L]` intact); no axioms / `maxHeartbeats
  1e6` / protected-sig edits / excuse-comments. Out-of-scope findings carried to recommendations.
  `task_results/lean-auditor-iter030.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: **restored proof-`\leanok` on 33 blocks** (sync over-strip
  false-negatives, the recurring `[[sync-leanok-overstrip]]` glitch — sync removed all 38 proof markers
  this iter). Restored exactly the 33 axiom-clean blocks per lvbc's verified classification; left bare the
  5 exclusion-set blocks: `tensorPowAdd_succ_left_braided` (own sorry), `tensorPowAdd_comm` (own sorry),
  `sectionMul_coherent` (compound; comm leg sorryAx-transitive), `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` (no Lean
  decl), `sectionGradedModule_gmodule` (no Lean decl). Build-green with exactly 2 sorries ⇒ all other decls
  axiom-clean; lvbc confirmed no false markers. Justified manual override per review-agent domain.
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` proof block: **repaired a sync-eaten
  `\uses{` opener** (dangling `lem:gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast, def:sectionMul,
  lem:directSum_gsemiring_mathlib}` with no `\uses{` — the 3 blueprint-doctor bare-label findings).
  Restored to `\uses{lem:sectionGradedRing_gmonoid, lem:gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast, def:sectionMul,
  lem:directSum_gsemiring_mathlib}`. begin/end proof now balanced 38/38; all labels resolve. (lvbc's
  strip-focused scan missed this; the doctor caught it — both should be consulted.)

## Blueprint-doctor (other findings — NOT actioned, surfaced)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` covers 2 non-existent files; 33 broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` across
  dormant chapters (Cohomology/GlueDescent/QuotScheme). These are out-of-cone merge-back/extraction
  artifacts on DEFERRED (χ leg) / COMPLETE lanes — per ARCHON_MEMORY do NOT edit; resolve at merge.

## Notes (LOW)
- lean-auditor MAJOR (other file): `RelativeSpec.lean:701–703` stale comment claims `functor` body is
  `sorry` but L709 body is concrete — cosmetic comment cleanup, not this iter's lane.
- lean-auditor must-fix×4 are pre-existing iter-176 QuotScheme.lean skeleton sorries (χ leg) with
  auto-flagged excuse-comments — deferred, do not re-assign.

## Recommendation (next iter)
Build the generic-`M` core for brick 1′ succ (the only real wall), then the whole comm chain →
`GCommSemiring` cascades. See `recommendations.md`.
